references.title: Agent-Based Personalized Assessment Tasks Recommendation Considering Objective and Subjective Factors

extracted.Comments:
The recommender system incorporates a little bit of KT. The goal of the work is to predict success on exercises and, from there, recommend what is the most suitable exercise for the learner in question - in this case - generate an assessment.

The recommender starts with evaluating learner ability

annotations.text: Learning for individuals depends on many factors but assessments often are one-size fits all approaches. Thus, recommending assessments in a personalized way would be very helpful. The work proposes an autonomous agent-based approach for recommendations of assessment tasks:
After extensive experimentation, the authors find their model outperforms traditional content-based or collaborative filtering recomendation approaches.
